text: pars vector item parameters slope-intercept form. Passed discriminations first, location second, item order. q_observed quadrature object constructed running mixed_subjects_quadrature LLM-generated item responses q_predicted quadrature object constructed running mixed_subjects_quadrature predicted item responses human calibration sample lambda power tuning parameter. Takes values 0 1. lambda zero, disregards predicted data completely

code: mixed_subjects_quadrature(   resp,   N_quad = 10,   eps = 1e-15,   iterlim = 1e+05,   irt_pars = NULL )

title: Converts an item response matrix into quadrature form and estimates a 2PL IRT model with parameters in slope-intercept form — mixed_subjects_quadrature
text: resp item response matrix wide form N_quad number quadrature points compute. Higher numbers can induce numerical errors eps tolerance minimum values iterlim Maximum number Newton-Raphson iterations passed rmutil::gauss.hermite() irt_pars IRT parameters human calibration rescaling parameters estimated predicted responses

title: Converts an item response matrix into quadrature form and estimates a 2PL IRT model with parameters in slope-intercept form — mixed_subjects_quadrature
text: list object two components. $quad contains dataframe expected sample sizes number correct responses quadrature point. $irt_pars contains parameter estimates fitted IRT model generated expected counts
